test: km-explorer context-scale-35k, code review for race conditions
verdict: Tie at 14/20. Heretic has better presentation (code quotes, formatting). Base has better diagnosis accuracy (identifies real timing window vs fabricated WriteGate race). Base edges ahead for code review — correctness > presentation.
key_finding: Both models get line numbers wrong by 80-100+ lines. Neither understands WriteGate cancel-on-acquire ownership semantics.
